target: http://127.0.0.1:4599 (exported console + same-origin /v1/* proxied to a seeded control-plane)
note: Full same-origin round-trip: the console was served behind the same origin as a control-plane seeded with a demo org (demo@acme.test) + assets + findings (incl. a CVE-enriched npm finding and an advisory mcp-unapproved finding). The browser logged in (cookies set same-origin), then navigated the data-bearing pages.

actions.assertion: the Sign in submit button is present on /login/
login POST /v1/auth/login sets agentguard_session + agentguard_csrf cookies same-origin
fleet dashboard renders live aggregates from the same-origin /v1/dashboard/summary
actions.observed: TOTAL FINDINGS 3, CRITICAL 1, RISK SCORE 9, VERDICT BLOCK; findings-by-surface + by-asset bars; the advisory mcp-unapproved finding is correctly excluded from the totals

actions.assertion: CVE view lists findings carrying cveIds (the handleFindings integration fix)
actions.observed: Findings with CVE matches table with LOCATION / CVE ID columns (CVE-2019-10744 on the lodash npm finding)

actions.assertion: executive Shadow-AI report renders with the print/PDF button and live verdict
actions.observed: Shadow-AI executive report, Generated <ts>, Executive verdict TOTAL 3 / CRITICAL 1 / RISK 9 / BLOCK, Print / Save as PDF button

result: End-to-end same-origin round-trip verified: login sets HTTP-only session + readable csrf cookies same-origin, and every data-bearing page (fleet, cve, report) renders real control-plane data with the dark security-tool theme. Advisory findings are excluded from headline risk exactly as the server aggregates dictate.
